name: 校園惡霸×隱障轉學生
name_en: School bully × transfer student with hidden disability
description: 男主是全校聞名的打架王，女主是隱藏聽障的優等轉學生。兩人在社會地位、性格、背景上的巨大反差創造了強烈的CP感。男主的「壞」恰好成為保護女主的力量，女主的「弱」恰好軟化男主的硬殼，形成完美互補。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Andrea Harper, you should stay away from Ryan. He hangs out with thugs outside of school all the time. He's not a good person. / Didn't you hear they bullied Andrea? / Ryan, why are you being so kind to me? I've been using you. / Does it still hurt? It doesn't at all. We are going to the hospital right now.
examples.context: 男主是全校聞名的打架王，女主是隱藏聽障的優等轉學生。兩人在社會地位、性格、背景上的巨大反差創造了強烈的CP感。男主的「壞」恰好成為保護女主的力量，女主的「弱」恰好軟化男主的硬殼，形成完美互補。
